prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年该科类最低位次分别为约11927名、14218名、12521名、28090名、24510名。2021–2023年（旧高考理科）位次在11927–14218之间波动，2024年江西省首次新高考，因选科分组（首选物理再选不限组）导致位次大幅后移至28090名；2025年回升至24510名，较2024年前移约3580名，显示新高考模式下该校在'再选不限'组的报考热度有所恢复。2025年基准位次约24510名；该校在江西省理科/物理类招生计划：2021–2023年均为50人，2024年增至58人，2025年大幅扩至91人；2026年计划81人，较2025年缩招10人（约-11%）。缩招意味着投放名额减少，在报考热度不变的情况下竞争略有加剧，位次数字有上移压力。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 河北工业大学为211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名2026年第107名，近年排名稳定在103–109名区间，属于中游211院校。学校位于天津市，是河北省唯一一所异地办学的211高校，在华北地区工科领域有一定影响力；该校近年无明显重大舆情事件，声誉文件未收录该校；抖音学校热度总排名第93位，评价为'一般'，短视频平台曝光量处于中等偏下水平，未出现明显的报考关注升温信号。历史投档异常记录中亦未见该校断档或暴跌记录，报考心理预期较为平稳；该校在第五轮学科评估中无A-及以上等级学科，优势学科主要集中在电气工程、化学工程与技术、机械工程、材料科学与工程等工科领域（B+等级），学科实力在211高校中处于中等水平，对高分考生的吸引力有限。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 2026年专业热度数据显示，电气工程及其自动化（高热推荐）、电子信息/通信（高热推荐）、计算机类（推荐）等工科专业报考热度持续走高，与该校核心招生专业高度契合，可能带动整体报考热度。江西省2026年高考总考生约474900人，较2025年（约472480人）略有增加，物理类考生按历史比例估算约26.8万人，竞争环境总体稳定略紧。；河北工业大学校址在天津市（隶属河北省），对江西省考生而言属于跨省报考。该校在江西省招生占比不高（2025年约3.3%），地域偏好因素影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次在新高考后逐步企稳回升的趋势、2026年招生计划较2025年缩招约11%带来的竞争加剧、以及电气/电子信息等热门专业热度对报考的拉动作用，在2025年基准位次24510名基础上，预计2026年最低位次小幅前移（位次数字减小）但受缩招和考生增加对冲，前移幅度有限。预测最低位次约22994名，区间22494–23494名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间22494–23494名内，建议以二档专业为主力填报、一档王牌专业（电气、计算机、电子）作为冲刺、三档专业作为保底。位次明显优于区间上限（如22000名以内）可重点冲刺电气工程及其自动化等王牌专业；位次接近区间下限（如23500名左右）应以三档专业保底为主，争取进入该校平台后再通过转专业或考研调整方向。该校工科实力均衡，电气、机械、化工等传统工科就业质量较高，适合对工科感兴趣的理科考生。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for this subject category were approximately 11927, 14218, 12521, 28090, and 24510 respectively. From 2021 to 2023 (old Gaokao science track), rankings fluctuated between 11927 and 14218. In 2024, Jiangxi implemented the new Gaokao for the first time, and due to subject grouping (first choice physics, second choice no restriction), the ranking significantly dropped to 28090. In 2025, it rebounded to 24510, moving forward by about 3580 compared to 2024, indicating a recovery in application popularity for the 'no restriction on second choice' group under the new Gaokao model. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 24510. The university's enrollment plan for science/physics in Jiangxi: 50 students each year from 2021 to 2023, increased to 58 in 2024, and significantly expanded to 91 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 81 students, a reduction of 10 (about -11%) compared to 2025. The reduction means fewer slots, and with unchanged application popularity, competition slightly intensifies, putting upward pressure on ranking numbers.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Hebei University of Technology is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranks 107th, with a stable ranking range of 103–109 in recent years, placing it among mid-tier 211 institutions. The university is located in Tianjin (affiliated with Hebei Province) and is the only 211 university in Hebei that operates outside the province, with certain influence in the engineering field in North China. In recent years, there have been no major public opinion incidents; the reputation file does not include this university. On Douyin, the university's overall popularity ranking is 93rd, rated as 'average', with short video platform exposure at a medium-low level, showing no clear signal of rising application attention. Historical admission anomaly records also show no instances of ranking drops or crashes, indicating stable application expectations. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, the university has no A- or above level disciplines; its advantageous disciplines are mainly in engineering fields such as Electrical Engineering, Chemical Engineering and Technology, Mechanical Engineering, and Materials Science and Engineering (B+ level). Its disciplinary strength is at a medium level among 211 universities, with limited appeal to high-scoring students.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: 2026 major popularity data shows that engineering majors such as Electrical Engineering and Automation (highly recommended), Electronic Information/Communication (highly recommended), and Computer Science (recommended) continue to see rising application popularity, highly aligning with the university's core enrollment majors, potentially driving overall application popularity. In 2026, the total number of Gaokao examinees in Jiangxi is approximately 474,900, a slight increase from 2025 (about 472,480). Physics category examinees, estimated by historical proportion, are about 268,000, indicating a generally stable but slightly tight competitive environment. Hebei University of Technology is located in Tianjin (affiliated with Hebei Province), making it a cross-province application for Jiangxi examinees. The university's enrollment proportion in Jiangxi is not high (about 3.3% in 2025), so regional preference factors have limited impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the gradual stabilization and recovery trend of historical rankings after the new Gaokao, the intensified competition due to an approximately 11% reduction in the 2026 enrollment plan compared to 2025, and the pulling effect of popular majors like Electrical and Electronic Information on applications, based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 24510, it is predicted that the minimum ranking for 2026 will slightly move forward (ranking number decreases), but the extent of the forward movement is limited due to the offsetting effects of enrollment reduction and increased examinee numbers. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 22994, with a range of 22494–23494.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 22494–23494, it is recommended to primarily fill in Tier 2 majors, use Tier 1 flagship majors (Electrical, Computer, Electronics) as reach options, and Tier 3 majors as safety options. If the ranking is significantly better than the upper limit of the range (e.g., within 22000), focus on reaching for flagship majors like Electrical Engineering and Automation. If the ranking is close to the lower limit of the range (e.g., around 23500), prioritize Tier 3 majors as safety options, aiming to enter the university platform and then adjust direction through major transfer or postgraduate entrance exams. The university has balanced engineering strength, with traditional engineering fields like Electrical, Mechanical, and Chemical Engineering offering high employment quality, suitable for science students interested in engineering.
